creator: sheldonh@uunet.co.za
text:
On Tue, 15 Aug 2000 22:19:47 +0200, "Sascha Valckenier Kips" wrote:

> I follow the instructions in the UPDATE file.
> 
> Update from 4.x-RELEASE to 4.x-STABLE
> 
> 0. cvsupdate for TAG RELENG_4 from file 4.x-stable-supfile
> 
> 1. make buildworld
> 2. make buildkernel KERNEL=[MYKERNEL]
> 3. make installkernel KERNEL=[MYKERNEL]
> 4. reboot
> 5. make installworld
> 6. reboot
> 
> Point 0. is okay (Done)
> Point 1. makes the error.

I hate to say it, but this looks like you're having the typical sig11
problems that have their own FAQ entry:

	http://www.freebsd.org/FAQ/troubleshoot.html#AEN1564

I assume this because this isn't a common problem, and other folks seem
to be managing this upgrade without a hitch.  I may be wrong, but if I
were in your shoes, I should check this possibility first.

Ciao,
Sheldon.
